items.raw_excerpt: Que tal viver uma experiência diferente perto do mar? Listamos cinco motivos para mostrar que praia no inverno pode ser tão boa quanto no verão. Spoiler: você tem a chance de relaxar com vistas paradisíacas só para você. Leia mais no Viver Bem!
items.summary_en: Casa Pino lists five reasons to visit the beach in Bombinhas, Santa Catarina, during winter. It says visitors can relax near the sea with quieter views than in summer.

items.title_en: Five Reasons to Visit Bombinhas Beach in Winter

items.raw_excerpt: Vor fünf Jahren haben Eva Hefti und Sarah Pfäffli das Online-Familienmagazin lanciert. Nun stossen sie in die Kommunikationsberatung vor.
items.summary_en: Eva Hefti and Sarah Pfäffli started an online family magazine five years ago. Now they are moving into communication consulting. Their agency advises companies that target families.
items.summary_ko: 에바 헤프티와 사라 페플리는 5년 전 온라인 가족 매거진을 창간했다. 이제 이들은 커뮤니케이션 컨설팅으로 영역을 넓힌다. 가족을 타깃으로 하는 기업들을 대상으로 자문한다.
items.title_en: Small-town agency helps companies reach families

items.summary_en: Burgdorf, a small Swiss town, is working on plans for its future development. The project involves local residents and aims to make the town livable for future generations.

items.summary_en: Students from Kholpe are documenting the biodiversity of Sal village in Goa. The project catalogs local plants and animals in the village. This is a community-level environmental effort by local students.

items.raw_excerpt: Austria’s long school summer break is nearly here, and for many families it raises the same question every year: how do you cover weeks of childcare when working life doesn’t pause with the school calendar?
items.summary_en: Austria's long school summer break is almost here. Many working parents need to find childcare for several weeks while their jobs continue.
items.summary_ko: 오스트리아의 긴 학교 여름방학이 곧 시작된다. 많은 맞벌이 부모들은 일이 계속되는 동안 몇 주간의 아이 돌봄을 어떻게 해결할지 고민하고 있다.
items.title_en: Austrian parents face long summer childcare gap
items.title_ko: 오스트리아 부모들, 긴 여름방학 돌봄 고민
items.title_original: TELL US: How do working parents in Austria cover the long summer holidays?

items.raw_excerpt: El municipio valenciano de Canet d’en Berenguer ha preparado una programación para celebrar las fiestas de San Juan con una propuesta que combinará música en directo, gastronomía, espect...
items.summary_en: Canet d'en Berenguer in Valencia has prepared a San Juan festival program without the usual bonfires. The town will replace them with new activities, including live music, food, shows, and a zombie night.
items.summary_ko: 스페인 발렌시아의 카네트 덴 베렝게르가 산후안 축제에서 전통 모닥불을 열지 않기로 했다. 마을은 소란과 훼손을 막기 위해 라이브 음악, 먹거리, 공연, 좀비의 밤 같은 새 프로그램으로 축제를 채운다.
items.title_en: Valencia town skips San Juan bonfires to prevent vandalism

items.raw_excerpt: Son pueblos que resguardan vestigios de un pasado que marcó su identidad y que manifiestan un compromiso con la cultura local y el desarrollo del turismo rural.
items.summary_en: Argentina highlights three places where visitors can learn about historic mining routes. The places keep traces of the past and support local culture and rural tourism.

items.raw_excerpt: Etter en modell fra Nederland skal Bærum kommune bygge en landsby for nærmere 100 demente på Dønski.
items.summary_en: Bærum municipality plans to build a village at Dønski for almost 100 people with dementia. The idea follows a model from the Netherlands.

items.raw_excerpt: En plena ruta hacia la Región de Murcia, Miguel Ángel Revilla decidió abandonar la autovía para darse un homenaje muy concreto: un plato de paella en un discreto restaurante de un pueblo de Valencia. El expresidente cántabro convirtió esa parada en una declaración pública sobre cuál es, para él, la auténtica paella valenciana, un plato ... Leer más
items.summary_en: Miguel Angel Revilla left the highway on his way to Murcia to eat paella at a quiet restaurant in a small village in Valencia. The former Cantabrian president used the stop to say what he thinks real Valencian paella should be.
items.summary_ko: 미겔 앙헬 레비야는 무르시아로 가던 길에 고속도로를 벗어나 발렌시아의 작은 마을에 있는 조용한 식당에서 파에야를 먹었다. 전 칸타브리아 주지사인 그는 이 방문을 계기로 자신이 생각하는 진짜 발렌시아식 파에야가 무엇인지 공개적으로 말했다.
items.title_en: A Small Valencia Village Paella Wins Over Miguel Angel Revilla
items.title_ko: 발렌시아 작은 마을의 파에야, 미겔 앙헬 레비야를 사로잡다
items.title_original: La paella del restaurante de un pequeño pueblo de Valencia que ha cautivado a Miguel Ángel Revilla - Noticias del Vino

items.raw_excerpt: This month, the quiet but powerful reputation of Auberge Saint-Mathieu was echoed by some of the industry's biggest distinctions, including the Michelin guide.
items.summary_en: Auberge Saint-Mathieu, a restaurant in a Quebec village of about 1,500 people, is getting major recognition. Its quiet reputation was backed by major food honors this month, including attention from the Michelin guide.

items.raw_excerpt: When you arrive in Austria, you will likely be bowled over by the stunning landscape, culture and Schnitzel of which there are plenty. But what about the things that are common elsewhere that you don't see here?
items.summary_en: Austria is known for its scenery, culture, and schnitzel. The article looks at everyday things that are common in other countries but not often seen in Austria.

items.raw_excerpt: Die Bundesstadt stimmt mit 50,75 Prozent fÃ¼r die Erbschaftssteuer. Einzig das 34-Seelen-Dorf Schelten im Berner Jura sagt ebenfalls Ja.
items.summary_en: Switzerland's inheritance tax initiative was approved by just two places: the city of Bern with 50.75% and the village of Schelten in Bernese Jura, home to only 34 people. Every other municipality voted No. Schelten was the only community outside Bern to support the measure.
items.summary_ko: 스위스 상속세 발의안 투표에서 찬성표를 던진 곳은 베른시(50.75% 찬성)와 베른 쥐라 지방의 주민 34명 마을 셸텐 두 곳뿐이었다. 나머지 모든 지자체는 반대표를 던졌다.
items.title_en: Only Bern and tiny village Schelten voted Yes to inheritance tax
items.title_ko: 상속세 발의안 찬성한 곳은 베른시와 34명 마을 셸텐뿐
items.title_original: Schweizweite Einzelgänger: Nur die Stadt Bern und Schelten stimmen der Juso-Initiative zu - Der Bund

items.raw_excerpt: In einer kleinen Gemeinde muss nicht alles andere auch klein sein. Das beweist die Firma Trachsel Holzbau GmbH aus Landiswil: In ihren Betriebsräumen steht eine der schweizweit produktivsten CNC-Maschinen. Thomas Trachsel erzählt, was sie kann. Und warum er mit seiner Firma Landiswil treu bleibt.
items.summary_en: Trachsel Holzbau GmbH in Landiswil has one of Switzerland's most productive CNC machines. Owner Thomas Trachsel explains what the machine can do and why his company stays loyal to the small village.
items.summary_ko: 란디스빌의 Trachsel Holzbau GmbH에는 스위스에서 손꼽히게 생산성이 높은 CNC 기계가 있다. 대표 토마스 트락셀은 이 기계가 무엇을 할 수 있는지, 그리고 회사가 왜 작은 마을 란디스빌에 남아 있는지 설명한다.
items.title_en: A Big Wood Shop in a Small Swiss Village
items.title_ko: 스위스 작은 마을의 큰 목공소
items.title_original: Trachsel Holzbau Landiswil: Die grosse Schreinerei im kleinen Dorf - BERN-OST

items.raw_excerpt: Long before Nestory Irankunda's World Cup goal buoyed Australian fans he made his start with Adelaide's Northern Wolves Soccer Club, where he is a hero to many other young players who share a similar background.
items.summary_en: Nestory Irankunda started at Adelaide's Northern Wolves Soccer Club before becoming a Socceroos star. Young players with similar backgrounds now see him as a local hero.
